style: clean legal-corporate, enterprise-trustworthy, minimal enterprise UI

typography.strategy: Old Money Tech / Corporate SaaS - Authoritative but clean.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H4. Emphasize clarity and authority. Avoid generic Inter/Roboto.

body.usage: Use for body text, form inputs, and app data tables.

mono.usage: Use for document IDs, audit trail hashes, and technical compliance references.

surface_strategy.cards: Sharp outlined cards with subtle shadows. Use `border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm rounded-lg`. Do not use heavy drop shadows.
surface_strategy.app_shell: Minimalist enterprise. Sidebar should have `bg-slate-50 border-r border-slate-200`. Topbar `bg-white border-b border-slate-200`.
surface_strategy.marketing_header: Crystal Glass or Solid. `bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200`. No pure transparent headers.

spacing_and_layout.marketing: Generous spacing. Sections should use `py-24` or `py-32`. Containers use `max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 lg:px-8`.
spacing_and_layout.app: Dense and highly legible. Use `p-6` for dashboard containers, `gap-4` for grids.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Use 12-column or bento layouts for marketing. Use strict 3-col or 4-col bento grids for dashboard summary cards.

buttons.primary: `bg-blue-700 hover:bg-blue-800 text-white rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors`
buttons.secondary: `bg-white border border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors`

badges.compliance: Subtle pill. `bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase`
badges.status: Color-coded pills (e.g., Draft = Gray, Sent = Blue, Signed = Green). Use background tints and dark text.

component_rules.tables: Clean, unboxed tables. `w-full text-left border-collapse`. Header row `border-b-2 border-slate-200 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-500`. Rows `border-b border-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-50 text-sm`.
component_rules.forms: Use Shadcn-style inputs. `border-slate-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500`.
component_rules.logo: Placeholder SVG: Shield outline + document + fingerprint inside + straight stylus mark. Navy/Cobalt blue. Text: 'Touch2Sign' in Chivo bold.

marketing.Home: Hero with 'UK-Compliant eSignatures & Deed Witnessing', 'Book a demo' CTA, 'Sign In' secondary. Followed by Compliance Strip, 3 Pillars, 4-step workflow, and Solutions.
marketing.Features: Detailed breakdown of deed witnessing, signatures, and transactions.
marketing.Security_Compliance: Focus on eIDAS QES, UK ECA 2000, UK DIATF, PAdES, SCCR. High trust visuals.
marketing.Solutions: Grid or tabs for Legal, HR, Operations, Client Agreements, Conveyancing, Estate Agents, Accountants.
marketing.Pricing: Sample tier plans (Starter, Business, Enterprise) with feature checklist (Pricing option b).
marketing.Contact: Form: name, work email, company, team size, message.

app.Dashboard: Summary cards (Documents, Pending Signatures, Verifications, Completed), recent documents table, activity feed.
app.Documents: List/table with status badges (Draft, Sent, Signed, Witnessed, Archived), action buttons.
app.Signatures: Workflows view. Kanban or list style tracking.

hero_office.description: Lawyer signing on tablet. Use for Hero section or Home page.

digital_signature.description: Close up of digital document signing. Use for Features or 3 Pillars section.

secure_technology.description: Person using a secure digital screen. Use for Security & Compliance page.

corporate_meeting.description: Corporate team meeting. Use for Solutions (Real Estate / HR) section.

legal_stamp.description: Wooden stamp on document. Use for Deed Witnessing feature context.

uk_skyline.description: UK business office skyline. Use for Contact page or Global Solutions background.

icons.usage: Use highly legible, professional icons (e.g., ShieldCheck, FileSignature, Fingerprint, PenTool, Scale, Building, Users). No playful or generic AI emojis.

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: NEVER use generic placeholder text or emojis for logos or icons.
Do not center align app container text. Left-align for natural reading flow.
Do not apply `transition: all`. Use specific transitions like `transition-colors`, `transition-transform`.
Add `data-testid` to all interactive and key elements (e.g., `data-testid='login-button'`).
Implement micro-animations on interactive elements (hover states, slight transforms).
Use layered z-index hierarchy and avoid pure black or pure grey. Tint greys slightly with blue.
Ensure marketing sections have high-end padding (p-12 to p-24) to avoid cramped layouts.
Use Phosphor or Lucide icons, never default emojis.
Ensure standard contrast ratios (WCAG AA). Avoid low contrast grey text on white backgrounds.
Create sharp outlined cards with 1px border and very subtle ambient shadows, not harsh drop shadows.
